business_ideas.idea: Story: Ed Thorp inventing card counting for blackjack and creating world's first wearable computer for roulette prediction
Story: Ed Thorp founding one of first hedge funds using quantitative/mathematical approach instead of fundamental analysis

predictions.text: Pursuing hobbies and interests without outcome focus leads to unexpected business breakthroughs and better long-term success
Knowledge that someone else succeeded at something increases probability of finding your own solution without knowing their method
